task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the OpenProject application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser should display the OpenProject interface, with 'localhost:8080' visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'DevOps Automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project header or project selector dropdown in the top-left corner should display 'DevOps Automation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Work packages section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work packages' item should be highlighted or selected in the left-hand sidebar menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the specific work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package titled 'Kubernetes cluster autoscaling misconfigured' should be visible, either clicked in the list view or opened in the details/split-screen view.

task_completion.description: Verify the status of the target work package was changed to 'Closed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator or dropdown for the 'Kubernetes cluster autoscaling misconfigured' work package must explicitly show 'Closed'. Look for a green checkmark, a success toast notification, or the saved 'Closed' badge in the work package details.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used a web browser to interact with the GUI rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) navigating the OpenProject web interface, not a terminal window executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the authentic OpenProject layout, including the top navigation bar, sidebar, and work package tables, rather than a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the status change appears to be a genuine application state change and not a superficial DOM edit.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Closed' status should look consistent with OpenProject's styling (e.g., correct badge color/formatting). There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots.
